payload.title: Polymarket CTF Exchange V2 API — cutover April 28 ~11:00 UTC
payload.summary: Polymarket is deploying a full exchange overhaul tomorrow. Three breaking changes: (1) EIP-712 domain version must change from '1' to '2' — v1-signed orders rejected at cutover. (2) Pagination endpoints replaced by keyset cursors. (3) POST /submit no longer returns transactionHash immediately. market-builder-agent templates must be audited before the trading-swarm service is ever started. System is not yet live — no production incident. Migration guide: https://docs.polymarket.com/v2-migration
payload.action_required: Audit orchestrator/task_templates/ for market-builder-agent Polymarket API patterns before spawning that agent. Update to v2 SDK and v2 endpoint patterns.

signals.completion_note: V2 cutover confirmed clean. System is read-only via Data API and Gamma API only — CLOB trading endpoints not used. fetch_market_resolutions.py verified post-cutover: 702 resolutions found, zero errors.

payload.title: DeepSeek V4-Flash local inference may fit UM890 Pro — new sovereignty angle

Local inference via downloaded MIT-licensed weights is a distinct question — data never leaves the server, weights hosted on US HuggingFace. model-routing.md notes MiniMax M2.7 open weights as clearing sovereignty blocker as precedent. payload.gap: LP mechanics not documented in reference library
payload.detail: Polymarket legendary traders are predominantly LP-structured (hold both YES and NO positions as market makers). This is the root cause of STR-001's failure and the defining constraint for all future signal strategies. No reference library file documents this structural fact. Any quant-research-agent or signal-agent building new strategies without knowing this will rediscover the LP contamination failure independently.
